大小单双斩长龙.【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239015738_63804359<br>vk.com/topic-238951778_63804358<br>vk.com/topic-238932606_63637894<br>vk.com/topic-239015749_64075844<br>vk.com/topic-239015786_63637846<br>vk.com/topic-239015779_64075835<br>vk.com/topic-239015703_63499092<br>vk.com/topic-238940177_64732799<br>vk.com/topic-238932606_63637912<br>vk.com/topic-238999489_64075920<br>vk.com/topic-238976533_63499115<br>vk.com/topic-238999047_64732869<br>vk.com/topic-238917385_63203292<br>vk.com/topic-239015734_63286391<br>vk.com/topic-239015786_63637915<br>vk.com/topic-239015738_63804411<br>vk.com/topic-238901768_63804439<br>vk.com/topic-239015749_64075912<br>vk.com/topic-238981696_63637892<br>vk.com/topic-238999489_64075937<br>vk.com/topic-239004150_64382045<br>vk.com/topic-238937297_64732844<br>vk.com/topic-239015748_63804381<br>vk.com/topic-238913960_64382053<br>vk.com/topic-238901768_63804463<br>vk.com/topic-238855620_64382119<br>vk.com/topic-238951778_63804416<br>vk.com/topic-239004296_63637963<br>vk.com/topic-239015749_64075954<br>vk.com/topic-238901768_63804490<br>vk.com/topic-239015738_63804461<br>vk.com/topic-239015779_64075919<br>vk.com/topic-238855620_64382133<br>vk.com/topi
